## Lab library (durable capability notes on file)

- **Hybrid Cloud-Trigger / Local-Runtime Agents** — Small local program listens for triggers from the cloud and does the actual work on the user's own machine — not cloud-sandbox, not pure-local
- **AI Browser Extension Security Risk** — AI-powered browser extensions inherit the user's logged-in session for every site they touch, creating a cross-site credential attack surface
- **AI Scientist-v2** — Agent that searches over research moves (hypothesize, experiment, analyze, revise) rather than next tokens

*When today's news touches one of these, reach for it: cite the lab note in The Lab section rather than re-explaining from scratch.*
